description_long: This is a thick, hardcover book with a deep brown, slightly textured cover. The front cover features a large, stylized gear emblem in black and gold, with a turquoise hexagonal shape at its center, giving it a mechanical or steampunk aesthetic. The book's spine is embossed with gold text and has small turquoise accents at the ends. The pages are visibly aged or yellowed, suggesting a vintage or well-used appearance. Metal rivets or studs are present at the corners of the cover, adding to its robust, industrial look. The overall design is ornate and thematic, likely intended for a fantasy or investigative genre.
description: A thick, brown hardcover book with a gear emblem and turquoise accents, featuring gold-embossed text on the spine and metal corner studs.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showing the closed pages and the front cover with the gear emblem and turquoise center.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the top, displaying the full gear emblem and turquoise hexagon on the cover, with all four metal corner studs visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the book is shown, again highlighting the closed pages and the cover's emblem, but from the reverse direction.
description_view_3: The spine of the book is visible, showing gold-embossed text and turquoise accents at both ends, with the textured brown cover wrapping around.
attribute_cover_illustration: The cover features a large, stylized gear motif in black and gold, with a turquoise hexagonal shape at its center. The design is bold and mechanical, evoking a steampunk or investigative theme. Metal rivets accent the corners, enhancing the industrial aesthetic.
attribute_title_text: An Investigation into Demonic Disturbances in the Fogmoor Province
attribute_spine_design: The spine is brown with a textured, leather-like appearance and features gold-embossed horizontal text. Small turquoise accents are present at both ends, and the text is oriented horizontally for easy reading when the book is lying flat.
